notes: Layered state: index.ts is a thin adapter that creates app runtime state and delegates to src/pi command/event registration modules.

Layer roles are folderized for this phase: src/config owns config loading/defaults, src/domain holds pure decisions, src/app holds runtime/evidence/state services, src/pi/commands.ts and src/pi/events.ts wire Pi runtime behavior, and top-level docs/prompts/skills/references/schema files remain package resources.
